channel.title: GitHub AI Ranking Changes (Top 10)
channel.description: Track changes in GitHub AI repository rankings (Top 10 per category)

item.title: [Deepseek] unsloth
item.description:
🆕 NEW ENTRY - Ranked #10 in Deepseek
Unified web UI for training and running open models like Qwen, DeepSeek, gpt-oss and Gemma locally.
Language: Python
Category: Deepseek Stars: 56,835 | Forks: 4,771

item.title: [Claude] awesome-claude-skills
item.description:
📉 Rank: #8 → #9 (↓1)
A curated list of awesome Claude Skills, resources, and tools for customizing Claude AI workflows
Language: Python
Category: Claude Stars: 46,198 | Forks: 4,700

item.title: [Claude] ui-ux-pro-max-skill
item.description:

item.title: [Claude] everything-claude-code
item.description:
📈 Rank: #4 → #3 (↑1) | ⭐ Stars: 86,063 → 88,711 (+2,648)

Language: JavaScript
Category: Claude Stars: 88,711 | Forks: 11,621

item.title: [AI] openclaw
item.description:
